title: More Visuals
description: A powerful and minimalistic PvP assistant for Fabric 1.16.5 with a fully customizable HUD and useful combat tools.
body:
⚔️ PvP Client

A powerful PvP Assistant designed to enhance your combat experience in Minecraft 1.16.5.
This mod provides a comprehensive suite of tools and visuals to give you an edge in battles while keeping your interface clean and informative.

🌟 Key Features:

🔊 Hit Sound: Get instant audio feedback (Anvil or EXP sounds) when you land a hit on your opponent.

🛡️ Armor Durability HUD: Monitor the status and durability of your armor and held weapon.

☀️ Visual Day: Lock your game time to a clear, bright noon for perfect visibility at all times.

🧪 Potion HUD: A clean and organized list of your active status effects, allowing you to stay focused on the fight.

⌨️ Keystrokes: Stylish on-screen display of your WASD and mouse clicks.

🏃 ToggleSprint: Automates your sprinting, freeing up your fingers for better movement and combat.

🔥 Low Fire: Lowers the fire overlay on your screen, ensuring that burning doesn't block your vision during intense PvP.

💬 Chat Binds: Set up custom keys to instantly send commands or messages to the chat.
